scoring_notes: Locked canonical 2026 derived split record. permit_status=TOTAL_ONLY; allocation_type=DRAW_TOTAL_ONLY.

recommended_permits.permit_note: 2026 total allotment from Utah DWR Hunt Planner export 2026_deer_buck_limited_entry_management_buck.csv; no resident/nonresident split published in this source.
